calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

David P. Wasserman, Esq., for the Plaintiff 1029 Geary Street, LLP.
Daniel Combs sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Mackenzie Krueger.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1029 Geary Street, #55, San Francisco, CA 94109.
Damages $5,886.35
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
for a Total Judgment of $5,886.35. Judgment to accrue interest at the legal rate until paid.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, 1029 Geary Street, LP is present. Represented by Joe Dudley.
Attorney, David Wasserman is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mackenzie Kruger is NOT present.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of December 16, 2013 remains on calendar.
